rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Educ. Code §21.3523, which governs State Board for Educator Certification review of National Board Certifications. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 21.3523. REVIEW AND AUTHORIZATION OF NATIONALLY BOARD CERTIFIED TEACHER DESIGNATION.
_note: No conflict; the rule_text concerns educator certification review and has no connection to property tax homestead exemptions.
